name: PROJECT VELOCITY
description: High-performance data visualization dashboard with real-time analytics and GSAP motion design.
overview: Project Velocity pushes the boundary of browser performance by rendering high-frequency data streams interactively. Designed specifically for fintech and high-frequency trading dashboards.
challenges: Optimizing canvas paints and DOM updates to handle 10k+ data points a second without dropping below 60fps. Resolved using WebGL offloading and virtualized lists.

name: PIXEL BLAST
description: Experimental WebGL art generator with custom shaders and particle systems.
overview: Pixel Blast is an interactive digital playground exploring generative web art. Using custom GLSL fragment and vertex shaders to displace geometric constraints.
challenges: Synchronizing audio frequencies directly to GPU variables using the Web Audio API to create audio-reactive visual distortions.

name: CORE SYSTEM
description: Next-generation CMS architecture for brutalist developer portfolios.
overview: A headless minimal CMS serving extreme brutalist frameworks. Unlocks the capability to securely author markdown pages via SSR and dynamic injections.
challenges: Developing a reliable monolithic architecture that delivers sub 30ms latency for all database queries and template streaming operations.
